raw_consumer_statement: My credit card information was stolen and there were about {$6000.00} of fraudulent charges. I disputed the charges with Citi. They gave back around {$1500.00} but the rest is still pending. They closed my old account and issued a new card. However I am still getting fraudulent charges on my old account which then transfers to my new account. The experience is very frustrating. I have called them on multiple occasions and they tell me they are working on it but may take up to two billing cycles. I asked what I should do with the fraudulent balance and they could not provide a straight answer typically saying it is up to you. The fraudulent charges occurred on XXXX XXXX. The new fraudulent charges were on XX/XX/XXXX.
